intro: Placeholder text. Please replace with a privacy policy reviewed by your own legal adviser and aligned to the data-protection law that applies to you (for example, POPIA or GDPR).

sections.title: 1. Who we are
sections.body: Aligning Strategy is the data controller for personal information collected through this website and through client engagements. Contact: [hello@aligningstrategy.com].

sections.title: 2. What we collect
sections.body: We collect only the information you choose to provide — for example, your name, organisation, email address and the content of your enquiry — together with limited, non-identifying technical information needed to operate the site securely.

sections.title: 3. How we use it
sections.body: We use your information solely to respond to your enquiry, to arrange and deliver engagements, and to meet legal obligations. We do not sell your information or use it for advertising.

sections.title: 4. Cookies
sections.body: This site uses a small number of strictly functional cookies to remember display preferences (such as light or dark mode). No tracking, analytics or advertising cookies are used.

sections.title: 5. Sharing
sections.body: We do not share your personal information with third parties except where necessary to deliver an engagement with your consent, or where required by law.

sections.title: 6. Your rights
sections.body: You may request access to, correction of, or deletion of your personal information, subject to applicable law. To exercise these rights, contact us at [hello@aligningstrategy.com].

sections.title: 7. Retention
sections.body: We retain personal information only for as long as needed for the purposes described above or as required by law, after which it is securely deleted.
